headline: Why Trade Desk Could Be the Next Stock Facing a Short Squeeze
summary: Trade Desk  stock is at risk of being next in line for a short squeeze, S3 Partners said on Thursday, as investors fret about slowing advertising spending, stiff competition, and the war in the Middle East.  S3’s director of research Leon Gross wrote in a blog post that the advertising technology company “faces its first squeeze risk in a year,” because short interest jumped 50% in March.  Trade Desk shares are down 40% in 2026, tanking due to concerns about slowing web-advertising revenue growth.
